notes: Iconic Seattle fine-dining. Fixed prix-fixe: $185/person, 6 courses (the diner picks 3, the kitchen sends the rest), with options across a first/second/third structure (sashimi/sunchoke/agnolotti; halibut to lamb, sockeye +$35; soufflé/mandarin/chocolate). The 1950 'Canlis Salad' can be added tableside +$20. No à la carte by design; 20% service charge added. EXPERIENCE-ONLY: composer presents the room (Lake Union views, impeccable service), the occasion fit, and the prix-fixe experience — no fabricated dish list.
